neighborhoods.name: Las Olas / Downtown
neighborhoods.description: Las Olas Boulevard with boutiques, galleries, and the Riverwalk arts and entertainment district
neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Fort Lauderdale. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Fort Lauderdale

neighborhoods.name: Wilton Manors
neighborhoods.description: Inclusive small city with Wilton Drive shopping, strong community identity, and walkable center

housing.predominantType: Single-family homes, duplexes, and small condos

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Fort Lauderdale's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Fort Lauderdale

neighborhoods.name: Sunrise / Tamarac
neighborhoods.description: Western suburbs with Sawgrass Mills outlet mall, affordable housing, and diverse communities
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Fort Lauderdale

neighborhoods.name: Coral Springs / Parkland
neighborhoods.description: Northern suburbs with top-rated schools, parks, and family-oriented master-planned communities
neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Fort Lauderdale
